mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repayment_plan (loan_id, user_id, term_index, principal, interest, penalty, total_amount, due_date, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{loanId}, #{userId}, #{termIndex}, #{principal}, #{interest}, #{penalty}, #{totalAmount}, #{dueDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repayment_plan WHERE status IN (0, 2) AND due_date < #{today}
SELECT rp.*, COALESCE(up.real_name, CONCAT('UID:', rp.user_id)) AS remark FROM repayment_plan rp LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON rp.user_id = up.user_id ORDER BY rp.due_date ASC
